title: Add canary marker module
description: Create the isolated ES module src/canary-marker.js exporting canaryMarker() with the exact monozukuri-v2-canary-ready return value. Keep the task within 60 minutes and do not modify src/index.js, package metadata, dependencies, or unrelated files so FR-001, FR-002, NFR-001, NFR-002, and NFR-003 are all covered.
acceptance_criteria: src/canary-marker.js exists and exports a named canaryMarker function.

The command node -e "import('./src/canary-marker.js').then(m=>{if(typeof m.canaryMarker!=='function')throw new Error('missing canaryMarker'); if(m.canaryMarker()!=='monozukuri-v2-canary-ready')throw new Error('bad marker');})" exits 0.
npm test exits 0, preserving the existing package behavior.
git diff -- src/index.js package.json exits 0 with no diff output, confirming existing API and package metadata were not changed.
Inspection of src/canary-marker.js shows no imports, I/O, environment reads, network calls, filesystem reads, logging, mutation, or new runtime dependencies.
